creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
The felt site has moved and a new version will be released, but I
will be unable to test it...

Updating the URL should be good anyway.

Fix: 

The official ftp site will now be felt.sourceforge.net in pub/FElt.
The web site can be found at http://felt.sourceforge.net.
